tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits for this patient’s age and sex. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, lipid profile, and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are unremarkable. No evidence of acute or chronic metabolic, renal, or cardiovascular disturbances from the laboratory perspective. No further laboratory action required at this time.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
